title: Three Wise Fools
writer: John McDermott, James O'Hanlon, Austin Strong
actors: Margaret O'Brien, Lionel Barrymore, Lewis Stone
plot: 40 years since Richard, James, and Theodore insulted 'The O'Monahan' and he put a vexing blessing on them, all three have obtained their dreams of grandeur, but they all live in one house as bachelors. Into this grand house comes ...
